Kadir Has University

Computer Engineering

Kadir Has University Department of Computer Engineering aims to train engineers specialised in areas such as software engineering, network engineering, artificial intelligence and cloud computing in today's rapidly developing technology world. The department is accredited by MÜDEK (Association for Evaluation and Accreditation of Engineering Education Programmes) and offers its students international certification programmes such as Cisco, Oracle, Microsoft CRM Dynamics and EMC.
